# Feature Request

## Summary
Provide a clear and concise description of the requested feature.

---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or workflow limitation this feature would solve.

---

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you would like the feature to work.

---

## Example Workflow
Explain how this would be used in a real environment.

---

## Expected Benefits

- Improved workflow automation
- Better deployment visibility
- Infrastructure improvements
- Reliability enhancements
- Other:

---

## Additional Context
Add any additional information, screenshots, diagrams, or examples here.
